userRestrict.cmdDescrp: Manage user restrictions for ticket types
userRestrict.optionType: Ticket type (optional - opens configurator if not specified)
userRestrict.title: User Ticket Restrictions
userRestrict.description: Manage which ticket types {user} can create
userRestrict.noTypes: No custom ticket types found! Create one with `/ticket type-add` first.
userRestrict.confirmRestrict: Are you sure you want to **restrict** {user} from creating **{type}** tickets?
userRestrict.confirmAllow: Are you sure you want to **allow** {user} to create **{type}** tickets again?
userRestrict.alreadyRestricted: {user} is already restricted from creating **{type}** tickets.
userRestrict.notRestricted: {user} is not restricted from creating **{type}** tickets.
userRestrict.notYourInteraction: You cannot interact with this message.
userRestrict.footer: Click a ticket type to toggle restriction

settings.adminOnlyMentionEnabled: Staff will be **pinged** when a ticket creator requests admin-only.
settings.adminOnlyMentionDisabled: Staff will **not be pinged** when a ticket creator requests admin-only.

settings.pingOnCreateDisabled: Staff will **not be pinged** when a **{0}** ticket is created.
settings.typeRequired: You must specify a ticket type for this setting!

workflow.notEnabled: Ticket workflow is not enabled for this server. Use `/ticket-setup workflow enable` to enable it.
workflow.notInTicket: This command can only be used inside a ticket channel.
workflow.ticketNotFound: No active ticket found for this channel.
workflow.noAssignment: This ticket is not currently assigned to anyone.
workflow.autoCloseWarning: This ticket will be automatically closed in {0} hours due to inactivity.
workflow.autoClosed: This ticket was automatically closed after {0} days of inactivity.
workflow.enabled: Ticket workflow states have been **enabled**. Default statuses have been configured.
workflow.disabled: Ticket workflow states have been **disabled**. Custom statuses are preserved for re-enabling.
workflow.statusInUse: Warning: {0} active ticket(s) currently use this status. They will keep their current status.
workflow.cannotRemoveRequired: Cannot remove required status: **{0}**. The `open` and `closed` statuses are required.
workflow.statusExists: A status with ID `{0}` already exists.
workflow.invalidStatusId: Status ID must be lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only (max 20 characters).
workflow.autoCloseEnabled: Auto-close enabled: tickets in **{0}** status will close after **{1}** days of inactivity (warning {2}h before).
workflow.autoCloseRequiresWorkflow: Auto-close requires ticket workflow to be enabled first.

sla.enabled: SLA tracking has been **enabled** with a target of **{0}** minutes. Breach alerts will be sent to {1}.
sla.enabledNoChannel: SLA tracking has been **enabled** with a target of **{0}** minutes. No breach alert channel configured — use the `breach-channel` option to set one.
sla.requiresWorkflow: SLA tracking requires ticket workflow to be enabled first.
sla.perTypeSet: SLA target for type **{0}** set to **{1}** minutes.

sla.perTypeNotFound: No SLA override found for type `{0}`.
sla.breachAlert: SLA Breach: Ticket #{0} in <#{1}> has been waiting **{2}** minutes for a first response (target: {3} min).
sla.statsNoData: No ticket data found for the specified period.

routing.notEnabled: Smart routing is not enabled. Use `/ticket routing-enable` to enable it.
routing.enabled: Smart ticket routing has been **enabled**. Add routing rules with `/ticket routing-rule-add`.
routing.disabled: Smart ticket routing has been **disabled**. Routing rules are preserved for re-enabling.
routing.ruleAdded: Routing rule added: **{0}** tickets will be routed to **{1}**.
routing.ruleRemoved: Routing rule for **{0}** has been removed.

routing.ruleDuplicate: A routing rule for ticket type `{0}` already exists. Remove it first to update.
routing.noOnlineStaff: No staff members are currently online for this ticket type. The ticket has been left unassigned.
routing.allAtCapacity: All staff members for this ticket type are at maximum capacity. The ticket has been queued.
routing.autoAssigned: This ticket has been automatically assigned to {0} via smart routing.

builder.autoCloseWarningOption: Hours before close to send warning (1-72)
builder.slaEnable: Enable SLA tracking for ticket response times
builder.slaPerType: Set a per-type SLA target override
builder.slaTargetOption: Target first response time in minutes (1-1440)
builder.slaTypeOption: Ticket type to set SLA override for
builder.slaMinutesOption: SLA target in minutes for this type (omit to remove override)
builder.slaDaysOption: Number of days to look back (default: 30)
builder.routingRuleAdd: Add a routing rule for a ticket type
builder.routingRoleOption: Staff role to route tickets to
